name: Mandarin Sunshine Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 large package vanilla instant pudding mix
1 20 ounce can crushed pineapple with juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cake mix, oil, eggs, and mandarin orange juice in a bowl. Mix on medium speed of an electric mixer for 2 minutes.
2. Pour the mixture into 3 greased baking pans.
3. Bake at 325°F (gas mark 4) for 15-20 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
4. Allow the cakes to cool completely on wire racks.
5. To assemble, spread frosting made from mixing Cool Whip®, vanilla pudding, sour cream, and crushed pineapple evenly over the top of each cake layer.
6. Frost the sides of the cake if desired.
7. Store the cake in a chilled container. This recipe freezes well.
